name: python3-flor
title: python3-flor
description:
efficient Bloom filter library (Python3 version)
Flor implements a Bloom filter class. A Bloom filter has a capacity (n) and a
false positive probability (p) that gives the probability that a filter filled
to capacity (i.e. with (n) distinct values inserted) will return True for an
element that is not in the filter.
.
This package contains the Python 3 version of the library.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-flor because efficient Bloom filter library (Python3 version).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-flor as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-flor with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-flor --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
